sentences.en: Knowing he likes dramas, it’d be good to talk about the latest shows.

id: N2-Noun を はじめ (Noun wo hajime)
title: Noun を はじめ (Noun wo hajime)
formation: Noun + をはじめ
shortExplanation: Meaning 'starting with', 'including', 'not only... but also'.
longExplanation: The grammar point Nounをはじめ is used to show that there are other things or people being included apart from the mentioned noun. It can be used to provide an example, indicate a representative or list items. This can be translated as 'starting with', 'including', or 'not only... but also...' in English.

sentences.jp: 日本料理をはじめ、さまざまな料理がこのレストランで楽しめます。
sentences.en: You can enjoy various dishes in this restaurant, starting with Japanese cuisine.

sentences.jp: 彼は絵画をはじめ、彫刻や写真もコレクションしている。
sentences.en: He collects not only paintings but also sculptures and photographs.

sentences.jp: 京都をはじめ、日本のいくつかの都市で伝統的な祭りが行われている。
sentences.en: Traditional festivals are held in several cities in Japan, including Kyoto.

sentences.jp: 太陽をはじめ、地球や火星などの惑星も太陽系に含まれている。
sentences.en: Not only the Sun, but also planets such as Earth and Mars are included in the solar system.

id: N2-Noun を はじめとして (Noun wo hajime to shite)
title: Noun を はじめとして (Noun wo hajime to shite)
formation: Noun + をはじめとして
shortExplanation: Expresses 'starting with', 'beginning with', or 'including'.
longExplanation: The grammar point Noun を はじめとして is used to emphasize a particular item or example along with others. It translates to 'starting with', 'beginning with', or 'including' in English. It is used to present a specific case and imply there are more related items.

sentences.jp: 東京をはじめとして、日本にはたくさんの観光スポットがあります。
sentences.en: There are many tourist spots in Japan, starting with Tokyo.

sentences.jp: 彼は、ピアノをはじめとして、たくさんの楽器を演奏できます。
sentences.en: He can play many instruments, starting with piano.

sentences.jp: この本は手作りのガーゼマスクをはじめとして、便利な生活アイディアが満載です。
sentences.en: This book is packed with useful life hacks, including how to make a handmade gauze mask.

sentences.jp: そのショッピングモールには、ZARAをはじめとして、多くのブランドが集まっています。
sentences.en: Many brands, including ZARA, gather in that shopping mall.

id: N2-Noun を はじめとする Noun (Noun o hajime to suru Noun)
title: Noun を はじめとする Noun (Noun o hajime to suru Noun)
formation: Noun1 を はじめとする Noun2
shortExplanation: Indicates a representative example of a group; 'starting with', 'including', 'such as'.
longExplanation: The grammar pattern 'Noun を はじめとする Noun' is used to indicate a representative example of a group and suggests that there are other things besides the mentioned example. It can be translated as 'starting with', 'including', or 'such as' in English.

sentences.jp: 彼はフランス語をはじめとする外国語が話せる。
sentences.en: He can speak foreign languages, starting with French.

sentences.jp: このコンサートには、BTSをはじめとする人気アーティストが出演する予定です。
sentences.en: This concert is scheduled to feature popular artists, including BTS.

sentences.jp: 彼女は魚をはじめとする海の幸が大好きだ。
sentences.en: She loves seafood, starting with fish.

sentences.jp: この図書館には、子供向けの本をはじめとするさまざまなジャンルの本があります。
sentences.en: This library has various genres of books, including children's books.

id: N2-Noun を めぐって (Noun wo megutte)
title: Noun を めぐって (Noun wo megutte)
formation: Noun + を + めぐって
shortExplanation: Concerning; with regard to; about
longExplanation: The grammar point Noun を めぐって is used to express that something is concerning, with regard to or about a certain noun. It covers a topic or an issue that is central to a discussion or a situation.

sentences.jp: 環境問題をめぐって、多くの議論が行われています。
sentences.en: Many discussions are held concerning environmental issues.

sentences.jp: 彼の死をめぐって、いくつかの陰謀説が浮かび上がっている。
sentences.en: Several conspiracy theories have emerged regarding his death.

sentences.jp: 昇給をめぐって会社と労働組合が話し合いをしています。
sentences.en: The company and the labor union are having discussions about pay raises.

sentences.jp: この映画をめぐって、賛否両論が存在している。
sentences.en: There are both pros and cons regarding this movie.

id: N2-Noun を めぐる Noun (Noun o meguru Noun)
title: Noun を めぐる Noun (Noun o meguru Noun)
formation: Noun1 + を + めぐる + Noun2
shortExplanation: Indicate a situation or event revolving around a particular noun; 'concerning', 'regarding', 'pertaining to'.
longExplanation: The NounをめぐるNoun grammar point is used to express that a situation or event is centered around a particular noun. It can be translated as 'concerning', 'regarding', or 'pertaining to' in English. The formation consists of the particle 'を' placed between two nouns, and the verb 'めぐる' (to revolve around) following the first noun.

sentences.jp: この事件をめぐる議論が続いています。
sentences.en: The debate concerning this incident continues.

sentences.jp: 環境問題をめぐる国際会議が開かれます。
sentences.en: An international conference regarding environmental issues will be held.

sentences.jp: 彼の突然の辞任をめぐるうわさが広がっている。
sentences.en: Rumors are spreading concerning his sudden resignation.

sentences.jp: 映画祭をめぐる活動が多くなっています。
sentences.en: There are increasing activities surrounding the film festival.

id: N2-Noun を もとに (Noun o moto ni)
title: Noun を もとに (Noun o moto ni)
formation: Noun + をもとに
shortExplanation: Based on; drawing from; using as a reference.
longExplanation: The grammar point Nounをもとに is used to convey that something is based on, drawn from, or using the noun as a reference. It is commonly used when one thing is being used as a foundation, source of information or inspiration for something else.

sentences.jp: この映画は実話をもとに作られました。
sentences.en: This movie was made based on a true story.

sentences.jp: 彼の経験をもとにアドバイスが必要だ。
sentences.en: Advice is needed based on his experience.

sentences.jp: データをもとに分析を行いました。
sentences.en: I performed an analysis based on the data.

sentences.jp: 世界中の美術館をもとにコレクションを作りました。
sentences.en: I created a collection based on art galleries all over the world.

id: N2-Noun を もとにして (Noun wo moto ni shite)
title: Noun を もとにして (Noun wo moto ni shite)
formation: Noun + をもとにして
shortExplanation: Based on; using; utilizing.
longExplanation: The 'Noun をもとにして' grammar point is used to express that something is done based on, using, or utilizing the noun. It indicates that the noun is the foundation, source or basis for the action or statement.

sentences.jp: 彼の意見をもとにして、計画を変更しました。
sentences.en: Based on his opinion, we changed the plan.

sentences.jp: この小説は実話をもとにして書かれています。
sentences.en: This novel is written based on a true story.

sentences.jp: 資料をもとにして、レポートを作成しました。
sentences.en: I created the report based on the materials.

sentences.jp: 過去の成功例をもとにして、新しいプロジェクトを進める予定です。
sentences.en: We plan to proceed with the new project based on past successful examples.

title: Verb ことなく (~kotonaku)
formation: Verb-stem + ことなく
shortExplanation: Means 'without doing', 'not doing', or 'without happening'.
longExplanation: The grammar point ことなく is added to the stem of a verb to express that something doesn't happen or isn't done. It can be translated as 'without doing', 'not doing', or 'without happening'. The formation depends on whether it is used with a verb.

sentences.jp: 彼女は泣くことなく帰ってしまいました。
sentences.en: She went home without crying.

sentences.jp: 彼は注意することなく突然出かけた。
sentences.en: He suddenly left without giving any warning.

sentences.jp: 山田さんは誰にも話すことなく会社を辞めました。
sentences.en: Mr. Yamada quit the company without talking to anyone.

sentences.jp: ２０年間、病気になることなく働いています。
sentences.en: I have been working for 20 years without getting sick.

id: N2-Verb ないことには Verb ない (~nai koto ni wa ~ nai)
title: Verb ないことには Verb ない (~nai koto ni wa ~ nai)
formation: Verb-ない + ことには + Verb-ない
shortExplanation: Express that something cannot be done without meeting a certain condition.
longExplanation: The ないことには grammar point is used to indicate that something cannot be done or achieved unless a certain condition is met. This pattern is formed by attaching ないことには to the negative form of a verb, followed by a negative outcome statement. It often appears as V-ない + ことには + V-ない or a negative expression.

sentences.jp: 薬を飲まないことには、病気が治らない。
sentences.en: Unless you take the medicine, the illness won't get better.

sentences.jp: この問題によく考えないことには、解決できない。
sentences.en: Unless you think carefully about this problem, you can't solve it.

sentences.jp: 練習をしないことには、スキルが上達しない。
sentences.en: Unless you practice, your skills won't improve.

sentences.jp: 手続きをしないことには、新しいパスポートがもらえない。
sentences.en: Unless you go through the procedures, you can't get a new passport.

id: N2-どうにか～ないものか (dō ni ka ~ nai mono ka)
title: どうにか～ないものか (dō ni ka ~ nai mono ka)
formation: どうにか + Verb-negative form + ないものか
shortExplanation: Express a strong desire or wish for something to be possible.
longExplanation: どうにか～ないものか is used to express a strong desire or wish for something to be resolved or made possible. It translates roughly as 'isn't there some way...?', 'can't we somehow...?', or 'is there no way...?'

sentences.jp: どうにかこの仕事を終わらせないものか。
sentences.en: Isn't there some way to finish this job?

sentences.jp: どうにか次の試験で合格しないものか。
sentences.en: Can't we somehow pass the next exam?

sentences.jp: どうにか込んでいる電車に乗れないものか。
sentences.en: Is there no way to get on the crowded train somehow?

sentences.jp: どうにか彼女と仲直りしないものか。
sentences.en: Isn't there some way to make up with her?
